payload.title: MTA 2026 Final Proposed Budget, Vol 2
payload.description: Volume 2 of the MTA November Financial Plan 2026-2029, comprising detailed financial and position schedules, narratives supporting baseline projections for the 2026 Final Proposed Budget and Financial Plan through 2029, and Agency sections with program descriptions and supporting baseline tables.

tool_args.label: Proposed Fare and Toll Rate Increase January 2026
tool_args.raw_text: The baseline November Plan includes fare and toll rates increases in January 2026 which are projected to increase farebox revenues by 4% and toll revenues by 7.5%.

payload.description: Baseline November Plan includes fare and toll rate increases in January 2026 projected to increase farebox revenues by 4% and toll revenues by 7.5%

tool_args.label: CBDTP Toll Collection Commenced January 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Toll collection for the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) commenced in January 2025.

payload.description: Toll collection for the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) commenced in January 2025

tool_args.label: Proposed Fare and Toll Yield Increase March 2027
tool_args.raw_text: Additionally, the Plan includes below-the-line in Volume 1 proposed 4% fare and toll yield increases in March 2027 and March 2029.

payload.description: Below-the-line proposed 4% fare and toll yield increase in March 2027

tool_args.label: Proposed Fare and Toll Yield Increase March 2029
tool_args.raw_text: Additionally, the Plan includes below-the-line in Volume 1 proposed 4% fare and toll yield increases in March 2027 and March 2029.

payload.description: Below-the-line proposed 4% fare and toll yield increase in March 2029

tool_args.label: CDOT 5% Fare Increase on New Haven Line - September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The 2025 CDOT fare increase is projected to generate $10 million annually beginning in 2026, and a second five percent fare increase, scheduled for July 2026, is expected to increase farebox revenue by another $6 million in 2026 and $11 million annually thereafter.

payload.description: Connecticut Department of Transportation five percent fare increase on the Connecticut portion of MNR's New Haven Line

tool_args.label: CDOT 5% Fare Increase on New Haven Line - July 2026
tool_args.raw_text: a second five percent fare increase, scheduled for July 2026, is expected to increase farebox revenue by another $6 million in 2026 and $11 million annually thereafter.

payload.description: Second CDOT five percent fare increase on the Connecticut portion of MNR's New Haven Line

tool_args.label: November Plan Maintains Stable Financial Outlook
tool_args.raw_text: The November Plan maintains a stable financial outlook for the MTA in the near-term, remaining balanced through 2026.

payload.claim_text: The November Plan maintains a stable financial outlook for the MTA in the near-term, remaining balanced through 2026.
payload.subject: MTA November Financial Plan
payload.description: Statement that the November Plan maintains balanced finances through 2026

tool_args.label: Additional $1.6B Federal Formula Grant
tool_args.raw_text: The November Plan includes an additional $1.6 billion federal formula grant that was initially deposited with New York City Transit and then shifted for pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) capital within subsidies.

payload.claim_text: The November Plan includes an additional $1.6 billion federal formula grant that was initially deposited with New York City Transit and then shifted for pay-as-you-go (PAYGO) capital within subsidies.
payload.subject: Federal Formula Grant
payload.description: Additional $1.6 billion federal formula grant included in the November Plan

tool_args.label: B&T 2025 Crossings Forecast
tool_args.raw_text: For the November Forecast, MTA consolidated ridership is projected to total 1,914 million passengers, while crossings are expected to total 339 million at B&T facilities.

payload.claim_text: For the November Forecast, MTA consolidated ridership is projected to total 1,914 million passengers, while crossings are expected to total 339 million at B&T facilities.

tool_args.label: TWU Local 100 Agreement Terms
tool_args.raw_text: In May 2023, collective bargaining resulted in an agreement between NYCT/MaBSTOA and the MTA Bus Company, affecting approximately 37,000 of the TWU Local 100's hourly operating employees. The agreement... covers the 36-month period from May 16, 2023, through May 15, 2026, and provides general wage increases on May 16th of each year of 3.0% for 2023, 3.0% for 2024, and 3.5% for 2025.

payload.claim_text: In May 2023, collective bargaining resulted in an agreement between NYCT/MaBSTOA and the MTA Bus Company, affecting approximately 37,000 of the TWU Local 100's hourly operating employees. The agreement covers the 36-month period from May 16, 2023, through May 15, 2026, and provides general wage increases on May 16th of each year of 3.0% for 2023, 3.0% for 2024, and 3.5% for 2025.
payload.subject: Transit Workers Union Local 100
payload.description: TWU Local 100 labor agreement terms for NYCT/MaBSTOA and MTA Bus Company
